description: Agent-first YouTube Shorts uploader: dry-run validation, OAuth checks, synthetic-media metadata.
name: io.github.davidmosiah/youtube-shorts-agent

environmentVariables.description: Set to false only when the agent should perform live YouTube upload operations. Defaults to dry-run behavior.
environmentVariables.name: YOUTUBE_DRY_RUN

environmentVariables.description: Google OAuth client ID. Optional until OAuth or live upload flows are used.
environmentVariables.name: YOUTUBE_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Google OAuth client secret. Keep local and do not expose it to agents.
environmentVariables.name: YOUTUBE_CLIENT_SECRET

title: YouTube Shorts Agent
